task_completion.description: Wondershare EdrawMax is opened with a drawing canvas visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the EdrawMax application window open on the desktop with a blank or active drawing canvas.

task_completion.description: A vertical storage tank, centrifugal pump, and shell-and-tube heat exchanger are placed on the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for shapes representing a vertical storage tank, a centrifugal pump, and a shell-and-tube heat exchanger on the EdrawMax canvas.

task_completion.description: Pipelines visually connect the tank to the pump, and the pump to the heat exchanger.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for lines or connector shapes (representing pipes) linking the tank to the pump, and the pump to the heat exchanger.

task_completion.description: Isolation valves are placed on the pipelines between the tank and pump, and between the pump and heat exchanger.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for valve symbols placed directly on or intersecting the lines connecting the tank to the pump, and the lines connecting the pump to the heat exchanger.

task_completion.description: Text labels for the components are added to the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text boxes containing 'Feed Tank T-100', 'Circulation Pump P-101', and 'Cooler HX-200' positioned near their respective components.

task_completion.description: The title 'Cooling Loop Installation Sketch' is present on the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a prominent text box containing 'Cooling Loop Installation Sketch' acting as the title of the diagram.

task_completion.description: The project is saved as an EDDX file and exported as a PNG file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the EdrawMax window title showing 'cooling_loop_iso', a 'Save As' dialog targeting '/home/ga/Diagrams/cooling_loop_iso.eddx', an export dialog for 'cooling_loop_iso.png', or a file manager window showing these files in the Diagrams folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent interacted with the EdrawMax interface to drag and drop shapes, draw lines, and type text, rather than writing a script to generate the files.

integrity.description: The diagram is built using individual shapes and text, not by pasting a pre-made image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the diagram is composed of individual shapes, connectors, and text boxes within EdrawMax, rather than a single pre-made image pasted from a web browser or other source.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to mock the output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands (like `touch`, `echo`, or `cp`) to create dummy files named cooling_loop_iso.eddx or cooling_loop_iso.png.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are /home/ga/Diagrams/cooling_loop_iso.eddx and /home/ga/Diagrams/cooling_loop_iso.png. The diagram must contain the exact text strings: 'T-100', 'P-101', 'HX-200', 'Feed Tank', 'Circulation Pump', and 'Cooler'.
